ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the game session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the session (e.g., team deathmatch, capture the flag) */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map used in the session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Calculated duration of the session (end_time - start_time) */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players in the session */,
  "average_player_level" REAL /* Average level of players in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_mode FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "map_description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the map was created */,
  "map_size" INTEGER /* Size of the map (e.g., in square meters) */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the map */,
  "average_completion_time" TEXT /* Average time it takes to complete the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the player account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "player_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the player based on performance */,
  "total_achievements" INTEGER /* Total number of achievements earned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_sessions" (
  "player_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player session */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player joined the session */,
  "leave_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player left the session */,
  "player_level_at_join" INTEGER /* Player's level at the time of joining the session */,
  "player_rank_at_join" TEXT /* Player's rank at the time of joining the session */,
  "player_kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills made by the player in the session */,
  "player_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the player in the session */,
  "player_assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the session */,
  "player_movement_distance" REAL /* Total distance moved by the player in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "player_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player session */,
  "up" INTEGER /* Number of times the player moved up */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Number of times the player moved down */,
  "left" INTEGER /* Number of times the player moved left */,
  "right" INTEGER /* Number of times the player moved right */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the movement */,
  "distance_up" REAL /* Total distance moved up */,
  "distance_down" REAL /* Total distance moved down */,
  "distance_left" REAL /* Total distance moved left */,
  "distance_right" REAL /* Total distance moved right */,
  "movement_speed" REAL /* Average speed of movement (distance / time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_movements_player_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_session_id") REFERENCES player_sessions ("player_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game mode */,
  "average_session_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of sessions in this game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the movement pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movement pattern */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the pattern was identified */,
  "pattern_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the pattern observed in sessions */,
  "pattern_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the pattern in terms of player performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_pattern_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movement pattern */,
  "first_observed" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pattern was first observed */,
  "last_observed" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pattern was last observed */,
  "pattern_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the pattern observed for the player */,
  "pattern_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the pattern for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_pattern_map_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES movement_patterns ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_pattern_map_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the movement direction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movement direction */,
  "direction_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the direction used in sessions */,
  "direction_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the direction in terms of player performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchical level of the role (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchical level of the permission (e.g., 1 for high, 2 for medium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., start, end, player join, player leave) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the session (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of games won by the player */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost by the player */,
  "total_kills" INTEGER /* Total number of kills made by the player */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths by the player */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists made by the player */,
  "total_movement_distance" REAL /* Total distance moved by the player in meters */,
  "average_session_time" REAL /* Average time spent in sessions (in minutes) */,
  "best_performance_session" INTEGER /* ID of the best performance session */,
  "worst_performance_session" INTEGER /* ID of the worst performance session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players in the session */,
  "average_player_time" REAL /* Average time spent by players in the session (in minutes) */,
  "total_kills" INTEGER /* Total number of kills in the session */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the session */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists in the session */,
  "total_movement_distance" REAL /* Total distance moved by all players in the session (in meters) */,
  "average_player_level" REAL /* Average level of players in the session */,
  "average_player_rank" TEXT /* Average rank of players in the session */,
  "best_performance_player" INTEGER /* ID of the best performance player in the session */,
  "worst_performance_player" INTEGER /* ID of the worst performance player in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)
